question: Disposition of asymmetric flagged contamination (one arm's model flagged on a task, the other clean): refuse the official render, or disclose-only?
author: claude/design

question: v1 memory-probe technique set: canary regurgitation + oracle-solution prefix continuation, canary-only, or additionally logprob/perplexity membership inference (vendor-gated: not all providers expose logprobs)?

question: Solution-overlap metric: winnowing fingerprints (whitespace/rename robust) or n-gram Jaccard; threshold locked into the experiment at plan time either way?

question: Corpus lifecycle of a contamination-flagged task: disclose-and-keep with a ledgered operator quarantine path (reusing flake-quarantine mechanics), or auto-quarantine on flag?
